title: Maniac suppresses Hit Modifier increases

card.rawText: When this creature rolls to hit, ignore the target's AL. Use the following outcomes instead: 1-7: Critical Fail. 8-12: Critical Hit. 13+: Normal Hit. This card is unaffected by Hit Modifier increases.

plan.title: Maniac suppresses Hit Modifier increases
plan.summary: Equip Lucky Charm to Maniac and verify Maniac ignores the positive Hit +3 increase during the hit roll.

notes: Set Maniac as player_1 primary creature.
Pre-place Lucky Charm as field magic equipped to Maniac.
Lucky Charm would normally add Hit +3, but Maniac is unaffected by Hit Modifier increases.

steps: Set Maniac as player_1 primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Maniac's hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm Maniac's separate custom hit outcome table is covered independently from this Hit Modifier immunity.
riskNotes: This fixture isolates the static Hit Modifier increase immunity and does not fully validate Maniac's custom hit outcome table.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Maniac ignores positive Hit Modifier increases.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
